\tzpentry{ID5129}{Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5129 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm EM} \;=\; F^{\mu\alpha}{F^\nu}_{\alpha} \;-\; \tfrac{1}{4} g^{\mu\nu} F^{\alpha\beta}F_{\alpha\beta}. \]
